productDisplayName: ASICS Men Gel Resolution Running White Sports Shoes
description: Well cushioned and comfortable, the GEL-Resolution tennis shoes from asics are high performance, lightweight shoes. These shoes are engineered to provide comfort and support to enhance comfort, performance and Fit. Team these with jeans and tees for a cool casual look.UpperFlexion Fit upper technology providing form-fitting comfort and support engineered for the elite player in mindMesh upper with synthetic overlays for comfort and durabilityBreathable mesh linings and removable insert for your convenienceLace-ups for snug fitSynthetic laces for enhanced durability and easy maintenanceCushioned collar and tongue for greater comfortBrand name on the tongue MidsoleTwo layers of memory foam line the collar and mold to the athlete's heel, creating a personalized fit - P.H.F. (Personal Heel Fit)An exoskeletal heel counter provides improved support and creates improved heel fitting environment - Heel Clutching System PGuard Toe Protector for enhanced toe durabilityOutsoleImpact Guidance System enhance the foot's natural gaitSolyte 55 employs 55° Solyte lasting material for a soft but stable platform feelRearfoot/Forefoot GEL Cushioning Systems attenuates shock during impact and toe-off phases, and allows movement in multiple planes as the foot transitions through the gait cycleAHAR+ (asics High Abrasion Rubber) placed in critical areas of the outsole for exceptional durabilityshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, cloth or brush, cold water and mild detergent to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierAvoid storing shoes in extremely hot conditions or in direct sunlight
